z1List differences between two sets of repositoriesc
--repo-oldz

oldz2Specify old repository, can be used multiple times)

helpz
--repo-newz
newz2Specify new repository, can be used multiple timesz
--archz
--archlistz
archeszhSpecify architectures to compare, can be used multiple times. By default, only source rpms are compared.z
--sizez
store_truez5Output additional data about the size of the changes.)
--compare-archzMCompare packages also by arch. By default packages are compared just by name.z
--simplez7Output a simple one line message for modified packages.z
--downgradezNSplit the data for modified packages between upgraded and downgraded packages.)

	configureM
RepoDiffCommand.configurec
compare_archr
arch)
pkgr
_pkgkey`
RepoDiffCommand._pkgkeyc
qhqV
compares packagesets old and new, returns dictionary with packages:
        added: only in new set
        removed: only in old set
        upgraded: in both old and new, new has bigger evr
        downgraded: in both old and new, new has lower evr
        obsoletes: dictionary of which old package is obsoleted by which new
        c
<listcomp>m
z-RepoDiffCommand._repodiff.<locals>.<listcomp>c
